rationale: The citing paper explicitly states that its high- and low-fear ads were adapted from Morales, Wu, and Fitzsimons (2012), and those adapted stimuli are used repeatedly across its experiments. This is a direct methodological use of the cited paper rather than a generic background mention. Although the citing paper does not test Morales et al.'s disgust mechanism, it relies on that prior fear-appeal paradigm to implement its own tests of God salience.
relation_description: The citing study applies Morales et al. (2012) by adapting its fear-appeal ad stimuli/paradigm as experimental materials in a new research context. It uses that prior setup to test a different moderator of fear-appeal effectiveness, namely reminders of God.
